summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: bus waiting paradox. NumberLine [0, 12] with BLUE Poisson-arrival dots (rate λ=1). RED passenger marker moves via ValueTracker pass_tr. always_redraw YELLOW highlights containing interval + ORANGE wait segment from passenger to next bus + live interval length + wait. Size-biased sampling of longer intervals ⇒ E[wait]=1/λ not 1/(2λ).
